label: Adobe Commerce SaaS (out-of-process)
_note: The out-of-process Commerce dev model — NO PHP backend. Custom logic lives in App Builder + API Mesh, the storefront in EDS drop-in blocks. Toolchain: Node + aio + git (no PHP/Java/Marketplace-keys for most paths). BUILDS ON app-builder + eds — activate those first; this product's flows reference their generators. Its Class C connectors (API Mesh · Live Search · Catalog Service · Recommendations · Data Connection · Payment Services) ARE the SaaS dev surface. When activated: add sources (aio templates + EDS drop-ins), generated data, and flows.
